steps.name: There is TeamOwner with team DeleteChannel on Staging backend
User TeamOwner configures MLS for team DeleteChannel
TeamOwner enables channel feature for team DeleteChannel via backdoor
User TeamOwner adds users Member1 to team DeleteChannel with role Member
Member1 adds a new device Device1 via backend
TeamOwner has channel conversation UnableToDelete in team DeleteChannel
User TeamOwner is me
User Member1 is available for channel participant selection and login
And I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I login as TeamOwner
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
And I see conversation UnableToDelete in conversation list
When I tap on conversation name UnableToDelete in conversation list
And I tap on channel conversation title UnableToDelete to open group details
And I open participants tab and start add participant flow
And I select Member1 from participant suggestions
And I verify Member1 is added to participants list and click close button
And I verify system message confirms Member1 was added
Then I see channel conversation UnableToDelete is in foreground
And I tap back button on conversationViewPage back to conversation list page
And I tap User Profile Button
And I see User Profile Page
When I tap New Team or Account button
And I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I login as Member1
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
steps.statusMessage: Login flow did not complete: login button or 'Setting up Wire' is still visible
